CREATE TABLE Demo.Orders (OrderID INTEGER, CustomerID VARCHAR(12), EmployeeID INTEGER, OrderDate DATETIME, RequiredDate DATE, ShippedDate DATETIME, ShipVia INTEGER, Freight DOUBLE PRECISION, ShipName VARCHAR(40), ShipAddress VARCHAR(60), ShipCity VARCHAR(15), ShipRegion VARCHAR(15), ShipPostalCode VARCHAR(10), ShipCountry VARCHAR(15));

INSERT INTO Demo.Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, EmployeeID, OrderDate, RequiredDate, ShippedDate, ShipVia, Freight, ShipName, ShipAddress, ShipCity, ShipRegion, ShipPostalCode, ShipCountry) VALUES (1, 'ALFKI', 1, '2022-01-01', '2022-01-05', '2022-01-02', 1, 15.00, 'Alfred Schmidt', 'Obere Str. 57', 'Berlin', 'Berlin', '12209', 'Germany');

INSERT INTO Demo.Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, EmployeeID, OrderDate, RequiredDate, ShippedDate, ShipVia, Freight, ShipName, ShipAddress, ShipCity, ShipRegion, ShipPostalCode, ShipCountry) VALUES (2, 'ANATR', 2, '2022-01-02', '2022-01-06', '2022-01-03', 2, 30.00, 'Ana Trujillo', 'Avda. de la Constitución 2222', 'México D.F.', NULL, '05021', 'Mexico');
SELECT * FROM sql_columns('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, 'Orders', NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_columns('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, 'Ord%', NULL);
SELECT * FROM sql_columns('Local Virtuoso', 'Demo', NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT OrderID, CustomerID FROM Demo.Orders WHERE CustomerID LIKE 'A%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Demo.Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany';
SELECT o.OrderID, c.CustomerName FROM Demo.Orders o JOIN Demo.Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Country = 'Germany';
SELECT ShipCountry, COUNT(*) AS OrderCount FROM Demo.Orders GROUP BY ShipCountry HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT o.OrderID FROM Demo.Orders o WHERE o.OrderID IN (SELECT OrderID FROM Demo.Orders WHERE Freight > 20.00);

INSERT INTO Demo.Orders (OrderID, CustomerID, EmployeeID, OrderDate, RequiredDate, ShippedDate, ShipVia, Freight, ShipName, ShipAddress, ShipCity, ShipRegion, ShipPostalCode, ShipCountry) VALUES (3, 'ANTON', 3, '2022-01-03', '2022-01-07', '2022-01-04', 1, 25.50, 'Antonio Moreno', 'Mataderos  231', 'Madrid', 'Madrid', '28000', 'Spain');
SELECT OrderID, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Demo.Orders GROUP BY OrderID HAVING SUM(Freight) > 15.00;
